title: coppensia edmundoi
intro: Coppensia edmundoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family, which includes coffee and gardenia. The medicinal properties of Coppensia edmundoi include its potential to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Research suggests that Coppensia edmundoi may have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Coppensia edmundoi include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
